meaning: n.中止,暂停,休止符vi.暂停,中止,停顿,踌躇n.暂停
examples: They pause and chew their pencils.
There was a long pause before she answered.
But during the giddy precrash era, that track record gave little pause to Citi or others.
It was down from the holiday quarter (and perhaps enough to give some investors pause).
